faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: We typically offer same-day or next-day service to Tompkinsville residents and businesses. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood and can reach you quickly, whether you're near the ferry terminal or in the residential areas surrounding Tompkins Avenue.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and moisture sources, professional-grade biofilm removal, targeted larvicide application, drain cleaning, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my Tompkinsville property?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic buildup inside drains, particularly in older plumbing systems common in Tompkinsville's historic buildings. Moisture from the coastal environment, infrequently used drains, and accumulated biofilm provide ideal breeding conditions for these pests.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in drain fly activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 7-10 days as the life cycle is broken. We schedule a follow-up inspection to confirm all drain flies have been eliminated from your Tompkinsville property.
